user.title: Connect to Pi-Somfy
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Pi-Somfy instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Pi-Somfy device.
data_description.password: Leave empty if no password is configured.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for position updates (5-300 seconds).

hassio_confirm.title: Pi-Somfy Add-on Discovered
hassio_confirm.description: A Pi-Somfy add-on was found at {host}:{port}. Do you want to set it up?

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Pi-Somfy
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your Pi-Somfy instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Pi-Somfy device.
data_description.password: Leave empty if no password is configured.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for position updates (5-300 seconds).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Pi-Somfy. Please check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This Pi-Somfy instance is already configured.

program_shutter.name: Program shutter
program_shutter.description: Send a programming signal to a shutter. The shutter must be in programming mode.

shutter_id.name: Shutter ID
shutter_id.description: The ID of the shutter to program (e.g. 0x123abc).

press_buttons.name: Press buttons
press_buttons.description: Send a raw button press to a shutter.

long_press.name: Long press
long_press.description: Whether to perform a long press.
